title: Toon Composite
description: Ce style fusionne une illustration vectorielle 2D plate et en cel-shading avec des arrière-plans photographiques haute résolution et vibrants. Les éléments illustrés présentent des contours noirs nets et uniformes ainsi que des aplats de couleurs unies, créant un effet 'Roger Rabbit' saisissant lorsqu'ils interagissent avec l'éclairage, les textures et les reflets réalistes de l'environnement réel.
description_en: This style merges flat, 2D cel-shaded vector illustration with vibrant, high-resolution photographic backgrounds. The illustrated elements feature crisp, uniform black outlines and solid color fills, creating a striking 'Roger Rabbit' effect as they interact with the realistic lighting, textures, and reflections of the live-action environment.
description_fr: Ce style fusionne une illustration vectorielle 2D plate et en cel-shading avec des arrière-plans photographiques haute résolution et vibrants. Les éléments illustrés présentent des contours noirs nets et uniformes ainsi que des aplats de couleurs unies, créant un effet 'Roger Rabbit' saisissant lorsqu'ils interagissent avec l'éclairage, les textures et les reflets réalistes de l'environnement réel.
prompt: Create a mixed media composite blending a 2D flat vector cel-shaded illustration seamlessly integrated into a vibrant, high-resolution live-action photograph. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on a striking juxtaposition: the primary subjects are rendered as pure 2D cartoons with crisp, uniform black outlines, zero pressure sensitivity, and solid, untextured color fills. These flat 2D elements utilize {{primary_color}} as the dominant base, supported by {{secondary_color}} and highlighted by {{accent_color}}, featuring minimal two-tone cel-shading. The surrounding environment is a crisp, vivid, daylight-balanced photograph with realistic textures, natural depth of field, and high-contrast lighting. Crucially, the flat 2D illustration must interact physically with the 3D photographic world, casting stylized reflections or shadows onto the realistic ground, water, or surfaces. The lighting direction on the 2D elements perfectly matches the harsh direct sunlight of the photographic background. Edge treatments are razor-sharp for the vector elements, contrasting distinctly against the natural photographic depth. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. This creates a surreal, pop-art infused effect where flat animation exists in the real world., mixed media composite, 2D vector illustration, cel-shaded, photographic background, toon integration, flat colors, uniform black outlines, pop-art surrealism, high-contrast lighting, sharp vector edges, forced perspective, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Create a mixed media composite blending a 2D flat vector cel-shaded illustration seamlessly integrated into a vibrant, high-resolution live-action photograph, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution relies on a striking juxtaposition: the primary subjects are rendered as pure 2D cartoons with crisp, uniform black outlines, zero pressure sensitivity, and solid, untextured color fills. These flat 2D elements utilize {{primary_color}} as the dominant base, supported by {{secondary_color}} and highlighted by {{accent_color}}, featuring minimal two-tone cel-shading. The surrounding environment is a crisp, vivid, daylight-balanced photograph with realistic textures, natural depth of field, and high-contrast lighting. Crucially, the flat 2D illustration must interact physically with the 3D photographic world, casting stylized reflections or shadows onto the realistic ground, water, or surfaces. The edges of the {{subject}} interact sharply with the {{background_color}}, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame (cropped by the image boundaries). The lighting direction on the 2D elements perfectly matches the harsh direct sunlight of the photographic elements. Edge treatments are razor-sharp for the vector elements, contrasting distinctly against the natural photographic depth., mixed media composite, 2D vector illustration, cel-shaded, photographic background, toon integration, flat colors, uniform black outlines, pop-art surrealism, high-contrast lighting, sharp vector edges, forced perspective, composited cutout
background_prompt: A vibrant, high-resolution daytime photographic environment bathed in harsh, direct sunlight. The scene features highly saturated, vivid colors with a strong contrast between deep shadows and bright highlights. The composition utilizes realistic textures such as rippling water, lush green foliage, and crisp architectural surfaces. A clear blue sky provides brilliant ambient illumination. The color palette emphasizes {{primary_color}} tones in the natural elements, contrasted by {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}} in the structural or reflective surfaces. The depth of field is natural, creating a crisp foreground that gently softens in the distance, establishing a perfect stage for mixed media integration.
background_prompt_removebg: A vibrant, high-resolution daytime photographic environment bathed in harsh, direct sunlight. The scene features highly saturated, vivid colors with a strong contrast between deep shadows and bright highlights. The composition utilizes realistic textures such as rippling water, lush green foliage, and crisp architectural surfaces. A clear blue sky provides brilliant ambient illumination. The color palette emphasizes {{primary_color}} tones in the natural elements, contrasted by {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}} in the structural or reflective surfaces. The depth of field is natural, creating a crisp foreground that gently softens in the distance, establishing a perfect stage for mixed media integration. In the foreground, a decorative flat 2D vector geometric pattern frame with uniform black outlines is placed in front of the invisible subject to create depth. Both the photographic scene and the 2D frame transition sharply into the clean {{background_color}} surface, creating a distinct cut-out effect.
